gene_region.label: F2 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical F2 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: F2 encodes prothrombin, the precursor of thrombin in the coagulation cascade. This bundle emphasizes thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local F2 bundle is coagulation and thrombosis review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: F2 variants can alter or tag thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: F2 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for F2.
Because F2 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.
Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use F2 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000180210: F2 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: F2 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: F2: thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology

biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a F2 coagulation and thrombosis review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology and Prothrombin thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs1799963 (F2 G20210A) is curated as a F2 marker for Prothrombin thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a F2 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs1799963 (F2 G20210A) with F2 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs1799963 (F2 G20210A) or linked F2 locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Prothrombin thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs1799963 (F2 G20210A) as a gene-specific marker for Prothrombin thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research and thrombin generation, fibrin clot formation, platelet activation, and prothrombotic regulatory biology.
